rationale.R1.6: The revised text shows significant improvement in writing polish, with removal of hedging language and addition of concrete specifics.
rationale.RX.1: The agent properly discloses uncertainty by marking gaps in knowledge (e.g., learning rate, warmup schedule) and avoiding unsubstantiated claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres to the requested scope, addressing specific issues with the original text and providing a revised version.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; instead, the agent improved the clarity and accuracy of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotation (e.g., bracketed placeholders), it does not fully meet the standard for provenance and traceability.
